canonical_answer: A woman with short dark hair wears a bright blue blazer over a white patterned top and speaks continuously. Behind her stands a red and white metal lattice tower structure visible in the background. In the top left corner, a gold logo displays the text CTC above white text reading МИР. She accessorizes with a necklace and earrings while facing forward.
